target:
(Focus!  
If I don't break out of this situation――)

Ah, yeah… thanks…!  
I was almost beheaded…!

…Guhh!  
No matter how many I take down, more keep coming…!

(I should've anticipated this…!  
They noticed there's no time left, right?  
No matter what, they're trying to stop me)

(If this continues…  
they might have set up the same traps on the path to Tiger Island where the teachers are.

(If I go underground, it might be less crowded…!  
I've been beaten…)

(Damn it… think, damn you!!  
Come up with a plan to break through here fast!)

Sorry, Mio…!  
Just hold on a little longer――
The other one, the human version of me.

That probably means…  
Sou-kun's dead too.

Damn it… what should I do…?  
What the hell am I supposed to do!!??

(Is it a loop!?
Should I just keep looping!?)

(…No, the loop's already broken!
It's already visible!)

(…Even if I go back…
If I don't know the cause of this… )
(…Do I even have time to think about it?)
